valid.name: having-with-group
valid.code: SELECT category, count(*) FROM items GROUP BY category HAVING count(*) > 1;

invalid.name: having-without-group
invalid.code: SELECT count(*) FROM users HAVING count(*) > 1;

errors.message: `HAVING` without `GROUP BY` collapses the query to one aggregate row over the whole table. If that is intended, put the predicate in `WHERE`. Otherwise, add a `GROUP BY`.
